ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (mpg) of the car */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the car's engine */,
  "displacement" REAL /* Displacement of the car's engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the car's engine */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the car */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the car */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the car */,
  "origin" INTEGER /* Origin of the car (1 for USA, 2 for Europe, 3 for Japan) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the car belongs */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "drivetrain" TEXT /* Drivetrain type (e.g., FWD, RWD, AWD) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V8, inline-4) */,
  "emissions_rating" TEXT /* Emissions rating of the car */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the car */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the car */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., in production, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_names" (
  "car_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car name */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "car_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the name belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_names_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_features" (
  "car_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car feature */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the feature belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_features_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_specifications" (
  "car_specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car specification */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the specification belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_specifications_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_performance" (
  "car_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car performance metric */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model to which the performance metric belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_performance_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the car */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "production_start_year" INTEGER /* Year production started */,
  "production_end_year" INTEGER /* Year production ended */,
  "model_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the model image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_features" (
  "model_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_specifications" (
  "model_specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model specification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_specifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "model_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the car data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the car data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the car data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers_origins" (
  "manufacturer_origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer-origin relationship */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturers_origins_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models_manufacturers" (
  "model_manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-manufacturer relationship */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_manufacturers_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_manufacturers_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
